headline: Solid Q1 Results Assert The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (PNC) as Goldman Sach’s Top Bank Stock
summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) is one of Goldman Sachs top bank stocks to buy. On April 15, The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) delivered solid first-quarter 2026 results on the back of strong legacy loan growth. Client activity in the quarter was strong across all geographies and positioned for strong momentum […]
